title: Prettier Cows x Fresh Animations
description: Remodelled cows and tons of new variants for multiple climates, with yaks and mooblooms and more!
body:
Prettier Cows remodels the vanilla minecraft cows and adds tons of new variants! There are also specific variants for different biomes. 

Special thanks to Pyeko for massive help with compatibility, as well as FreshLX for creation of Fresh Animations!

The original non-fresh animations pack can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-cows)
These include:

- Normal cows
- Warm cows
- Cold cows
- Desert cows
- Mountain/snowy plains cows
- Mooshrooms
- Flower Forest mooblooms

Modded Compatibility:

- Critter Armory
- Fungi Delight
- modded biomes can manually be added for the variant types by adding them in the cow.properties file in prettier-cows>assets>minecraft>optifine>random>cow folder

Also check out my other packs:
- [Ender Dragon Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ender-dragon-reborn)
- [Prettier Horses](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-horses)
- [Prettier Parrots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-parrots)
[Prettier Sheep](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-sheep)


Important!! This pack requires Optifine or Entity Texture Features and Entity Model Features to work!!
